Borealis - open data, code, weights recipe for training Audio LLM — Part 1 of 2.

👉 Swipe to see the full breakdown →

The mix is what the model sees at training time with noise augmentation enabled. vLLM ships a closed set of multimodal architectures out of the box ( Qwen2-Audio , LLaVA , Phi-4-MM , a couple more).

🔹 Don't dilute target-language data "for diversity." 02 Adding plain-text instructions At 25%, the model starts forgetting the audio task .
⚡ Where the 2.1× comes from.
🧠 Under the hood - serving and integrating with transformers Serving multimodal models isn't a new topic.
📊 When the user writes a prompt with one <|AUDIO <|start_of_audio <|AUDIO <|start_of_audio as "embedding will be supplied.
🔬 The plugin ( vllm_borealis ) sits next to the weights in the HF model repo.

Do you think OpenAI's move here is exciting or a risk? Drop your take below.
